marketing_seeds: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/month, shipment delays cause missed delivery windows. We provide a dashboard that tracks shipments and identifies delays instead of manual tracking and reporting via spreadsheets.
Frequent shipment delays and lack of performance visibility.
